brief.targetAudience: people who want switch from coffee

copyOptions.angle_rationale: Coffee switchers need reassurance from real people who made the same switch successfully — a verified testimonial from someone like them removes the biggest objection.
copyOptions.visual_description: A mixed-race woman in her early 30s wearing a dark athletic tank top and gold chain necklace holds up the Organica Tulsi Green Tea packaging toward the camera in a bright modern kitchen. Warm natural window light from the right illuminates her face with an authentic, post-workout glow while white cabinetry, a water bottle, and softly blurred everyday items fill the background in a shallow depth-of-field bokeh. The product packaging is sharp, forward-facing, and clearly legible as she raises it confidently toward the lens.
headlines: The Calm Energy Coffee Can't Give
subheadlines: Organica Tulsi Green Tea gives you steady focus — no jitters, no crash, no regrets.
Thousands have already made the switch. See why Tulsi Green Tea is their new morning ritual.
Ancient Tulsi + antioxidant-rich green tea. Clinically studied herbs. Real, lasting energy.

testimonial.quote: I ditched coffee 3 weeks ago. Zero headaches. I feel clear all day.
